verdict.description: Overall verdict on the PR. 'approve' = no concerns. 'comment' = non-blocking notes. 'request_changes' = something must be fixed before merge.

summary.description: One short sentence describing what the PR does.

reasoning.description: 1-3 sentences explaining the verdict at the whole-PR level.

comments.description: Line-anchored review comments. Each comment must point at a specific line in a file in the diff. Optional 'suggestion' replaces the line(s) when the reviewer can offer a concrete fix.

file.description: Path to the file, relative to the repo root.

line.description: Last line of the range the comment refers to (1-indexed, in the new file).

start_line.description: First line of a multi-line comment range. Omit for a single-line comment.

body.description: Comment body. Be direct; explain what is wrong and why.

suggestion.description: Optional replacement text for the lines covered by 'start_line'..'line'. Rendered as a GitHub commit suggestion. Omit when no concrete fix is being proposed.
